data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow', which is a critical requirement outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to this workflow, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, there is no mention of any compliance review process or tracking of review statuses, which are essential to confirm that this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of a post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add compliance review workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow is implemented and functioning as required.
